name: X Engagement Reply Agent
description: Polls targeted X authors, matches posts against Soofi Safavi articles via MCP semantic similarity, generates LLM reply drafts, creates Asana approval tasks.

capabilities.name: X Polling
capabilities.description: Monitors configured X authors for new posts on a schedule

capabilities.name: Semantic Matching
capabilities.description: Matches posts against Soofi articles via hosted MCP

capabilities.name: Reply Generation
capabilities.description: Generates 6+ reply drafts using LLM with distinct prompt strategies

capabilities.name: Asana Integration
capabilities.description: Creates approval tasks with X compose links for human review

inputs.name: watchlist
inputs.description: List of X authors to monitor

outputs.name: reply_drafts
outputs.description: Generated reply drafts with similarity scores

outputs.name: asana_tasks
outputs.description: Parent tasks + approval subtasks in Asana

readme:
# X Engagement Reply Agent

A standalone, code-managed agent for monitoring X authors and generating recommended reply drafts grounded in Soofi Safavi's published articles.

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install
npm run dashboard  # http://localhost:3000
```
installCommand: git clone https://github.com/prismteam-ai/x-engagement-reply-agent && cd x-engagement-reply-agent && npm install

name: Investors MCP
description: Model Context Protocol server providing semantic search over investor content, article matching, and knowledge retrieval for the Soofi ecosystem.

capabilities.name: Article Matching
capabilities.description: Compare queries against Soofi Safavi article corpus

capabilities.name: Content Ingestion
capabilities.description: Add new content to the knowledge base

outputs.name: matches
outputs.description: Ranked article matches with similarity scores

readme:
